- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created. File lives in `.github/`.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements. React 18 + TypeScript app with Redux Toolkit/RTK Query demo confirmed with the user.

- [x] Scaffold the Project. Next.js TypeScript template bootstrapped in a temporary folder and moved into the repo root.

- [x] Customize the Project. Implemented enterprise folder structure, storage adapters, RTK Query wrapper, feature slices/UI, middleware, and mocked APIs per requirements.

- [x] Install Required Extensions. No additional VS Code extensions were required beyond the defaults.

- [x] Compile the Project. Dependencies installed; `npm run lint` and `npm run test` complete successfully.

- [x] Create and Run Task. Not required—package scripts cover build, lint, and test workflows.

- [ ] Launch the Project. Awaiting user direction before starting a debug or dev server from VS Code.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete. README rewritten with project instructions; this file cleaned of comments and kept in sync.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
